html:
The Top Hat is a Hat Item found in the Dress Tab. It requires 6 Silk to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its Durability.

It restores 3.3 Sanity per minute while worn.

The Top Hat can also be used to create the Prestihatitator, which is a Tier 1 Magic research station.

The Top Hat can be given to a Pig, Bunnyman or, if you're playing as Webber, a spider to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn.

Downloadable Content

In all DLCs, the Top Hat provides 20% Wetness resistance.

In the Hamlet DLC, Top Hats can be bought for 10 Oincs at the Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City. Two of them are also required to craft The Sow's Ear Hat Shop using the Key to the City.

Usage

×4

×4

×2

×4

×4

Trivia

  • The Top Hat used to cost 200 Research Points to craft and had a value of 10 Research Points when used on a Science Machine.
  • The Top Hat once required the Alchemy Engine to craft. That was changed in the Hungry for Your Hunger update due to the addition of the Prestihatitator, which requires one Top Hat in the recipe and is prototyped with the Science Machine.
  • The Dress Tab's icon is a teal version of the Top Hat.
  • If playing as Wendy, a Top Hat will almost completely negate the effects of night sanity drain in normal conditions due to her lesser fear of night.
    • Note that despite Wendy's sanity icon not displaying an arrow going down, the Top Hat will not completely negate said effects.
  • Wickerbottom and Winona have almost the exact same quote. The only difference is their spelling of bourgeoisie.

Gallery

  • Top Hat Equipped
  • Wilson wearing a Top Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Top Hat.

  • Wormwood wearing a Top Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Top Hat.
  • Winona wearing a Top Hat.
  • Wortox wearing a Top Hat.
  • Wurt wearing a Top Hat.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

The '''Top Hat''' is a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] found in the [[Dress Tab]]. It requires 6 [[Silk]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 62.5% of its [[Durability]].

It restores 3.3 [[Sanity]] per minute while worn.

The Top Hat can also be used to create the [[Prestihatitator]], which is a Tier 1 [[Magic]] research station.

The Top Hat can be given to a [[Pig]], [[Bunnyman]] or, if you're playing as Webber, a [[spider]] to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn.

== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In all [[DLC]]s, the Top Hat provides 20% [[Wetness]] resistance.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Top Hats can be bought for 10 [[Oinc]]s at the [[The Sow's Ear Hat Shop|Sow's Ear Hat Shop]] in the [[Pig City]]. Two of them are also required to craft The Sow's Ear Hat Shop using the [[Key to the City]].

== {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe

|item2 = Boards
|count2 = 4
|item1 = Top Hat

|tool = Science Machine}}

|count1 = 2
|result = The Sow's Ear Hat Shop
|count3 = 4
|tool = Key to the City
|dlc = Hamlet}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* The Top Hat used to cost 200 [[science|Research Points]] to craft and had a value of 10 Research Points when used on a [[Science Machine]].
* The Top Hat once required the [[Alchemy Engine]] to craft. That was changed in the ''[[Version History#Hungry for Your Hunger|Hungry for Your Hunger]]'' update due to the addition of the Prestihatitator, which requires one Top Hat in the recipe and is prototyped with the Science Machine.
* The [[Dress Tab]]'s icon is a teal version of the Top Hat.
* If playing as [[Wendy]], a Top Hat will almost completely negate the effects of night sanity drain in normal conditions due to her lesser fear of night.
** Note that despite Wendy's sanity icon not displaying an arrow going down, the Top Hat will not completely negate said effects.
* Wickerbottom and Winona have ''almost'' the exact same quote. The only difference is their spelling of bourgeoisie.
{{clear}}
